name: Professional Bus Svc Mntnc Inc
owner_or_parent: Logan Bus Co. Inc. & Affiliates (Michael Tornabe)
principals: Michael Tornabe (Logan Bus Co. president/COO and owner)
recent_news: 3530 Oceanside Rd is the home of Guardian Bus Company, a Logan Bus subsidiary formed in 2014 to absorb Atlantic Express routes after Atlantic's Chapter 11 (Dec 2013). 'Professional Bus Service Maintenance Inc' is almost certainly the maintenance-arm corporate shell co-located at the Guardian depot.
fit_notes: NOT an independent tuck-in target. Captive maintenance/operating entity within the Logan Bus / Guardian Bus group (Michael Tornabe), one of NYC/LI's largest school-bus contractor groups. Pass unless platform-level conversation with Logan Bus.

name: Frank's School-Transportation
recent_news: Shut down 2005 by NYSDOT/DMV after inspectors discovered buses with forged inspection/registration stickers; corporate entity and owner Patrick Florio pled guilty in 2007 (Criminal Possession of a Forged Instrument). Court ordered $181k restitution and barred Florio from operating a bus company without bonding. No evidence of operations since.
fit_notes: DEFUNCT / disqualified. Closed by regulators on fraud findings ~20 yrs ago; founder convicted. Not a viable tuck-in. Remove from pipeline.

name: A & D Bus Co
districts_or_customers: Likely NYC DOE / OPT (Brooklyn yellow school bus)
recent_news: No M&A or news coverage found. Listed at 2765 W 16th St, Brooklyn (Coney Island) on Yelp, Manta, Nextdoor as a school bus service. Registered NY corporation (DOS ID ~966175). No website, no executive/owner public footprint.
fit_notes: Possible small independent Brooklyn OPT operator (~86 employees, ~$3.4M rev). Worth a brief outreach call to (718) 266-3102 to confirm operating status, NYC DOE route count, and ownership; recent NYC OPT contract turmoil (2025 negotiations) may pressure small operators toward exit.

name: Miller Transportation Bus Svc
recent_news: Indianapolis depot at 4045 Park 65 Dr is a regional location of Louisville, KY-headquartered Miller Transportation Inc. (USDOT 203686). Family-owned across three generations (1937 founder Emmett Sr.; 2nd-gen Tom and Emmett Jr. ran it 1960-2010s; 3rd-gen John Miller Jr. now leads). Fleet ~200 deluxe motorcoaches/school buses/shuttles/trolleys per company materials.
fit_notes: Independent 3rd-gen family operator with mixed motorcoach + ~140 school buses across Louisville/Indy/Columbus. Indianapolis is a branch, not standalone — the Louisville HQ entity is the real target. School-bus exposure is partial (field trips/contract work, not core district contracts). Lower fit than a pure yellow-bus contractor, but mid-size, multi-state, multi-gen — worth a soft approach to the family on succession.

name: East End Bus Svc LLC
owner_or_parent: unknown (co-located with Orange County Transit LLC at 1 Corporate Dr Unit 2, Holtsville)
districts_or_customers: Long Island (Suffolk County) districts (historic East End Bus Lines territory)
recent_news: East End Bus Lines Inc. (Medford, NY) filed Chapter 11 in Sept 2018 and exited school-district work summer 2019, liquidating that fleet. Separately, an NY LLC named 'East End Bus Service, LLC' is registered at 1 Corporate Dr Unit 2, Holtsville — the SAME suite as Orange County Transit LLC (Walden, NY-based; ~400 vehicles, ~500 employees, woman-owned; previously John Mensch). The Holtsville LLC appears to be either a successor shell to defunct East End Bus Lines or an affiliated entity of Orange County Transit's Long Island footprint.
fit_notes: Likely NOT an independent tuck-in — either a vestige of bankrupt East End Bus Lines (defunct) or a sub-entity of Orange County Transit LLC (which is itself a 400-bus strategic operator with multi-state ops). Recommend de-prioritize and confirm corporate status via NYS DOS lookup before any outreach.
